name: parecode
description: Plugins shipped alongside the Parecode MCP server — Claude Code agents and skills that pair with ParecodeSearch / ParecodeEdit for token-efficient exploration and editing.

plugins.name: parecode-explore
plugins.description: Read-only exploration agent and skill that delegates 'where is X' / 'how does Y work' questions to a Haiku-powered sub-agent driven by ParecodeSearch.
